walkthroughs.title: Get started with CodeNest
walkthroughs.description: Turn code decisions into permanent knowledge

steps.title: Create your first thread
steps.description:
Select any lines of code, then press Cmd+Shift+N (or Ctrl+Shift+N on Windows), or right-click → Add CodeNest thread. Write a note about why that code is written the way it is.
[Add a thread now](command:codenest.createThread)

media.altText: Selecting code and creating a CodeNest thread

steps.title: Search your knowledge base
steps.description:
Every thread is instantly searchable. Open the CodeNest sidebar and try searching for a keyword from any note you've written.
[Open search](command:codenest.searchThreads)

media.altText: Searching threads in the CodeNest sidebar

steps.title: Resolve threads when done
steps.description: Click any gutter icon to open the thread, then click Resolve when the discussion is complete. Resolved threads stay searchable forever — they are never deleted.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm run build:webview && pnpm run package
scripts.build:webview: cd webview-ui/threadPanel && npm install && npm run build && cd ../sidebarView && npm install && npm run build && cd ../searchPanel && npm install && npm run build
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run compile-tests && node node_modules/.pnpm/mocha@11.7.5/node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha.js --ui tdd out/test/fingerprint.test.js out/test/searchIndex.test.js
